channel.title: RadicalHorticulture on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in RadicalHorticulture on Nature Works

item.title: Woke Gardening
item.description:
More reactionary horticulture in the media

And there’s more in the Reactionary Horticulture saga. Luckily, ecological landscaper Rebecca McMackin has been following it in her latest newsletter Sturgeon Moon. http://localhost:1313/blog/230815-woke-gardening/

item.title: Radical Horticulture
item.description:
Gardens are irrevocably connected to society, and we need a radical shake-up of both

I read Benjamin Vogt’s A New Garden Ethic a few years ago (it’s brililant, have a read), and he continues joining up the dots between society, politics, economics and gardening with native plants. http://localhost:1313/blog/230805-radical-horticulture/
